title: [UI-kit] VcTable - implement VcTableColumn subcomponent for declarative column config
verdict_rationale: Re-test of the dev-confirmed fix. BUG-A (rowStyle opacity contrast, WCAG 1.4.3) is FIXED — opacity:0.5 replaced with text-neutral-500 (#737373), contrast 4.54:1–4.74:1, axe-core 0 violations. AMBIGUOUS 1.4.6 RESOLVED — fixed-column separator added via ::after/::before pseudo-elements (2px neutral-300). BUG-2 (Space key activation on role=button rows, WCAG 4.1.2) is NOT FIXED — bundle inspection shows withKeys(handler,['enter']) only; behavioral test on both Storybook 'Row Click' story and storefront /account/orders confirms Space scrolls the page without activating the row. preventDefault is also missing on the Space path. orders.vue regression sweep clean across columns, BL-ORD-001 (status labels), BL-ORD-005 (order# = URL), mouse/Enter/Ctrl-click, empty state, console, GraphQL. 5/5 other VcTable stories pass smoke.

build.developer_signal: Maya Diachkovskaia, JIRA comment 96905 (2026-05-07): 'please check updated orders table as well'

evidence.before: opacity:0.5 → effective #808080 over white = 3.94:1; axe-core 3 violations
evidence.after: color:var(--color-neutral-500) → #737373; contrast 4.74:1 over #FFF, 4.54:1 over #FAFAFA; axe-core 0 violations

BUG-2.title: Space key does not activate <tr role=button tabindex=0> row (WCAG 4.1.2)

evidence.bundle_handler: onKeydown: C2(s2 => Q.value && V.$emit("rowClick", L, F), ["enter"])  // C2 = withKeys; Space modifier missing
evidence.storybook_test: Row Click story — Space press, no row-click event, defaultPrevented=false
evidence.storefront_test: /account/orders — Space press, window.scrollY 0→686 (page scrolled), window.open NOT called, no navigation; Enter on same row works as expected

BUG-2.fix_required: Change withKeys(handler, ["enter"]) to withKeys(handler, ["enter", "space"]) and add event.preventDefault() in the handler to suppress native page scroll on Space.

AMBIGUOUS-1.4.6.title: Fixed-column visual separator on Coffee theme
AMBIGUOUS-1.4.6.evidence: ::after/::before pseudo-elements added on --fixed--start/--fixed--end variants — width 0.125rem (2px), background-color var(--color-neutral-300), position absolute

orders_vue.console: PASS — 0 Vue warnings (only pre-existing catalog image 404s)

by_design_clarifications_unchanged: Row click via window.open(_blank) — by-design new-tab navigation (memory: project_vctable_rowclick_newtab.md)
Ctrl+click + middle-click route through same handler — by-design
recommended_path: Return BUG-2 to dev (one-line keydown handler change) on PR #2261, re-deploy, re-test single story + storefront row. Alternative: file BUG-2 as separate JIRA ticket and transition VCST-4535 to TESTED with linked bug.
next_actions_pending_user_confirmation: Post re-test result comment to VCST-4535 (Atlassian MCP — needs explicit user authorization)
Decide: return to dev OR file BUG-2 as separate ticket via /qa-bug
If filing separate ticket: title 'P2 a11y — Space key does not activate VcTable role=button rows on /account/orders + Storybook', WCAG 4.1.2, link to VCST-4535
